crime.value: Murder by poison (neriin) - two victims died after eating contaminated food
crime.quote: trying to find out what the two victims ate that killed them

victim.value: Miss Kerr and another victim who consumed poisoned food, Kerr had eaten a salad containing tomatoes, lettuce and onion
victim.quote: It appears Miss Kerr ate a salad. I'm finding tomato's, lettuce and some onion

resolution.value: Case appears to be solved by Wallace as he indicates confidence in solving the murder
resolution.quote: after I solve this murder and I will solve this murder

investigator.value: Robert Wallace, commanding officer of the Major Crime Squad investigating the homicide case
investigator.quote: commanding officer of the Major Crime Squad

red_herring.value: Missing evidence from victim's vomit could have revealed poison source but was not preserved by first responders
red_herring.quote: As a hot shot criminal investigator you didn't save what she splashed on the car floor mats

clue_fairness.value: Poison identification (neriin) and autopsy findings shared equally with reader and investigator
clue_fairness.quote: It appears Miss Kerr ate a salad. I'm finding tomato's, lettuce and some onion

social_world.value: Police jurisdictional hierarchy with state vs local authority creating institutional tension
social_world.quote: you really don't expect me to kiss some troopers ass to get permission to investigate a case of homicide

reveal_mechanic.value: Forensic autopsy analysis revealing specific food contents and poison traces
reveal_mechanic.quote: Had you done that, I might be able to tell you where the neriin came from

investigator_wound.value: Personal relationship loss coinciding with case resolution - romantic rejection affecting investigator's emotional state
investigator_wound.quote: Robert Wallace opened his desk drawer and placed the black velvet covered ring box containing a one caret diamond

_meta.title: ebook robert f clifton gifts from the kasbah
